title: Savrip (language)
content:
{{Top|canon=Savripian}}
'''Savrip''' was the [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[Mantellian Savrip/Legends|Mantellian Savrips]], an intelligent [[Species/Legends|species]] native to [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. It was composed of roars, shrieks, and growls.<ref name="TOG">''[[Threats of the Galaxy]]''</ref>

It was a difficult language to learn, incomprehensible to other species. While modern translation equipment and droids had partial success in deciphering some simple linguistic concepts, the only way for a non-Savrip to fully learn the language was with the help of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="TOG" />

Conversely, few Savrips ever bothered to learn [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], and even in those cases, they rarely spoke it.

{{Language-stub}}
